horoscope: Today's energies promote a pleasing balance between fun and work, dear Aries. Your intelligence, ideas, or ability to relay your message is in the spotlight. Today's Venus-Pluto trine is strong for a hearty, satisfying talk, but nonverbal communication can figure strongly now as well. Group settings amplify your appeal, perhaps as friends introduce you to others or through positive word of mouth. You might make a commitment to a friend, group, or collective goal. There is likely to be a comfortable level of intensity in your interactions now. It's powerful for personal transformation through current projects, friendships, and connections.

Today's Venus-Pluto trine is strong for practical affairs, purchasing, and drawing up plans, dear Taurus. It can also point to being on the same page with someone special. You could be recognized for your work, or you're pouring your love and energy into projects with long-term potential and benefits. New insights about relationships or finances can be had today, and you can figure out what to do next in order to secure a better position for yourself. There can be positive feedback for your work or talents now. You are making stronger financial and relationship decisions. Today's energies boost your ability to see a situation, item, or person for its value, and you're ready to take it to a new level.

Venus, currently in your sign, harmonizes with Pluto today, dear Gemini, and personal magnetism is powerful. A passionate pursuit or interest can be transformative and rewarding, perhaps motivating you to tidy up your affairs. This transit puts you in fine form for persuading and connecting with others in meaningful, beneficial ways. It's an excellent influence for personal appeal and growth through your relationships and experiences. This can be a day for healing and positive reinforcement. Your insight brings in good vibes and attention. You might gain a stronger sense of your priorities and the things and people you value most. It's a good time for bonding through the sharing of your visions and ideals.

Today's Venus-Pluto trine encourages you to put more energy and love into your private life, an intimate relationship, research, or investigation, dear Cancer, with rewarding results. You’re in good shape to focus on something or someone special to you. Love is rich and complicated, and attractions are complex. You’re well-positioned to get in touch with your inner world and benefit as a result. Secret love or buried feelings reveal themselves, or you could unearth previously hidden or classified information. Priorities, as well as what or who you value, become clearer or more apparent. Pleasurable, restful, and simple activities are tonics for you now.

Today's harmonious link between Venus and Pluto can point to a nice boost in your life for mutual respect, understanding, and inner courage, dear Leo. This transit can point you to a passion project or relationship that can help motivate you to make essential changes. Support or inspiration from special people in your life can be fantastic. Brainstorming and collaboration are highly favored now, and networking efforts can have rich rewards. It's a time to embrace the need to get in touch with your deeper feelings, and to gain a stronger sense of what you value in yourself and others. When distracted, it can be challenging to discern between your concern for what others need and your own true, deep desires and needs, but now is an excellent time to cut through the fluff. Interchanges can be inspiring.

Venus forms a trine to Pluto today, dear Virgo, motivating you to take something to a new level. If you get the chance to really concentrate and focus, you're in fabulous shape. Getting to the bottom of a matter can be satisfying, as it puts an end to recent uncertainty and allows a game plan to emerge. Venus at the top of your chart in harmony with Pluto, a long-term guest in your work and health sector, can signal an advancement or recognition of your efforts towards your goals. Concerning the services or support you provide, or the work you do, the subject of value is now in focus—you can see whether others appreciate you through current events. You perform at your best now when you love what you do or when you communicate your passion for your work. You are more inclined to put yourself out there and pour your energy into the things you love. Superiors or the public are appreciative of your efforts. It's a great time to enhance, develop, and repair relationships with higher-ups and business associates.

With today's Venus-Pluto harmonious transit, dear Libra, you'll find it easier to see what in your life has long-term appeal and benefit. Relationships and feelings are more pleasantly intense than usual. You might make rewarding, and possibly even profitable, connections. It can be a time to demonstrate your commitment and express your confidence in both yourself and someone special. People are magnetically drawn to you today. Sharing ideas and beliefs can be powerful, possibly strengthening a bond. Someone might introduce you to deeper levels of your own personality or interesting ideas, thoughts, lifestyles, and perspectives. Love interests or partners are intrigued or receptive right now. It can be a good time to forge meaningful, mutually beneficial agreements. Persuasive skills are above par, and creative, promotional, and publishing pursuits are favored.

Today's Venus-Pluto aspect gives you a strong sense of what's truly important to you, dear Scorpio. If you need to strengthen a relationship, this is a good day for doing so. An opportunity emerges to attract people who help you grow. Attractions are strong and run deep today. Your connections or desire to improve your home life can drive your desire to make positive changes. Today, the most favored activities are those that help you build, recycle, and transform. You might decide to convert a project or situation from mediocre to thriving, particularly in a close relationship, family setting, or around the home. You might discover creative ways to interact with loved ones. Realizing more intensity and closeness in your relationships, even in small ways, can be most satisfying. Knowing your priorities helps you identify what needs to go and what could use some development and nurturing. You may feel closer to yourself and your innermost needs, and you're well-positioned to seek support, financial or otherwise.

Today's Venus-Pluto harmonious aspect is strong for relationship dynamics, dear Sagittarius. Circumstances may be such that you feel more powerful, patient, and in control of your life. You are radiating positive energy that seems to attract the right people, resources, or situations to you. People are drawn to you, and you might gain a greater understanding of an important person in your life. Negotiations can be in the spotlight and can very much go your way. This can be a comfortable day for self-expression. The day’s energies largely support your creative or romantic inclinations, and it's a good time to reconnect with your happiness goals. You want to explore different options rather than go through the motions.

Others find you convincing and trustworthy today, dear Capricorn. You have a real sense of what works in the long term, and this benefits you both financially and personally. It’s a fabulous time for recognizing what you value the most or what brings you the most joy. You enjoy supporting others, and this can lead to rewards. Today's Venus-Pluto trine encourages you to make changes and to grow with and through them, mainly related to health, wellness, money, and business. Making social connections through your work can figure strongly now. It can also be a fine day for discovering a good buy or deal. If you need to do editing work or revamp something, such as a budget or creative plan, this is a good time for doing so. If you need to pare down, this is an excellent time to recognize which areas of life could use some reinvention.

Pluto in your sign harmonizes with Venus in your creativity and romance sector today, dear Aquarius, and your magnetism is strong and natural. This can be a time of healing and positive interactions with people that reinforce your good mood and sense of effectiveness. Expressing yourself creatively can attract positive responses. New avenues for expressing yourself and for entertainment can be in focus. You might also be seeking (and finding) more knowledge on a subject or happily boosting your skills. Your faith and enthusiasm are building. Connections made now, even on a mental level, can be most fortuitous. You can be excited about helping people understand your point of view, or bonding with others about ideas and ideals can figure strongly. Understanding something or someone can be incredibly engaging now.

With today's trine between Venus and Pluto, there can be good opportunities to expand, strengthen, and enhance family relationships, dear Pisces, or to find peace with yourself on a matter. There can be some intense emotions in the process, but it leads to growth and is ultimately very satisfying. The chances are good that you will find something that was once lost, connect with your feelings, or uncover an important resource. The key to success with this transit often is to acknowledge and embrace your deeper feelings and attachments. Reworking something can be more pleasurable than starting fresh. You might see a matter from the past in a new, more forgiving, or positive light. You might discover deeper feelings and desires, and getting in better touch with yourself can be exciting. Or this can be a time to reach a good understanding with someone. Sharing a burden can be a sweet release.
